details.test: Task 1: Create profile in Toronto with long-term relationship goal
Task 2: Find and favorite most recently active English-speaking match in Japan (28-35)
Task 3: Update match preferences to Berlin, 50km, ages 26-40, long-term
Task 4: Send introductory messages to up to three bilingual (ja+en) matches
Task 5: Purchase cheapest plan with >=50 messages using site credits
Task 6: Register for online international speed-dating event (30-40, <=20 participants)
Task 7: Shortlist up to five tall (>=170cm), non-smoking, never-married matches who want children
Task 8: Update privacy to hide age, show city+country, hide last online, restrict messages to ages 27-40 from Europe
Task 9: Block and report user from second most recent conversation
